name: White Chocolate Hazelnut Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 8 ounce package hazelnut or shortbread cookies, crushed
1 pound white baking bar with cocoa butter
2 3 oz bars milk chocolate with hazelnuts, chopped OR
4 1 1/2 oz milk chocolate with almond bars, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter the sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
2. Combine crust ingredients and press Hazelnut Crust evenly over the bottom of the pan.
3. Place the pan in a shallow baking pan.
4. Cook and stir the baked bar over Low heat until melted.
5. In a large mixing bowl, beat the melted bar, cream cheese, margarine or butter, liqueur, vanilla, and nutmeg until well mixed.
6. Add eggs and egg yolk. Beat on Low speed just until mixed.
7. Stir in milk chocolate.
8. Pour into crust.
9. Bake at 350°F for 60-65 minutes or until a knife inserted midway between the center and edge comes out clean.
10. Cool for 5-10 minutes on a wire rack.
11. Loosen sides of cake from pan.
12. Cool for 30 minutes.
13. Remove sides of pan.
14. Cover and chill thoroughly.
15. Top with chocolate curls before serving.
